Tests if the cosine of π is equal to -1 using an assertion.

# Purpose
This code is a simple assertion test that verifies the behavior of the `Math.cos` function in JavaScript. It checks that the cosine of `Math.PI` is equal to `-1`, which is the expected mathematical result. The code serves as a basic validation to ensure that the `Math.cos` function returns correct values for specific input, in this case, the mathematical constant `PI`. This is a narrow functionality test, focusing on a single mathematical operation.
